text: SHIELD INSURANCE CO. Motor Vehicle Insurance Policy Policy Type Comprehensive Motor Insurance Policy Code CAR-COMP-2024 Valid For Private Vehicles (Cars, SUVs, Hatchbacks) Policy Duration 1 Year from date of issue Claim Window Within 30 days of incident 1. COVERAGE OVERVIEW This comprehensive motor insurance policy covers accidental damage, natural calamities, theft, and third-party liability for the insured vehicle. Coverage applies only when the policy is active and the claim is filed within the stipulated window. 2. COVERED DAMAGE TYPES The following damage categories are covered under this policy: Front Bumper Dent  Accidental dent or deformation to the front bumper caused by collision. Rear Bumper Dent  Damage to rear bumper from rear-end collisions or parking incidents. Front Bumper Scratch  Surface scratches on front bumper. Minor scratches under 5cm may not qualify. Rear Bumper Scratch  Surface scratches on rear bumper caused by contact or friction. Door Outer Dent  Dents on outer door panels from collisions or parking incidents. Door Outer Scratch  Scratches on outer door surface from keying, contact, or accidents. Door Outer Paint Trace  Foreign paint transfer on door panels from another vehicle. Bonnet Dent  Dents on the vehicle hood/bonnet from frontal impact or hailstorm. Fender Dent  Damage to front or rear fender panels from side impacts. Quarter Panel Dent  Dents on rear quarter panel near the wheel arch. Pillar Dent  Damage to A, B, or C pillars from side collisions. Roof Dent  Dents on roof panel caused by hailstorm, fallen objects, or collision. Running Board Den  Damage to side running boards or side skirts. Front Windscreen Damage  Cracks, chips, or shattering of front windshield glass. Rear Windscreen Damage  Damage to rear windscreen including cracks and breakage. Headlight Damage  Broken or cracked headlight assembly including

lens and housing. Taillight Damage  Damage to tail lamp or rear light assembly. Signal Light Damage (Signlight-Damage)  Damage to indicator or turn signal light covers. Side Mirror Damage (Sidemirror-Damage)  Physical damage to side view mirror housing or glass. Medium Body Panel Dent  Moderate denting across any major body panel. Major Rear Bumper Dent  Severe structural deformation of rear bumper requiring replacement. Paint Chip  Chipping of paint from stone impact, minor scrapes, or weather. Paint Trace  Transfer of paint from another vehicle or surface onto the car body. 3. CLAIM ELIGIBILITY CONDITIONS  Policy must be active and not expired at the time of the incident.  Claim must be filed within 30 days of the damage occurring.  Original photographic evidence of damage must be submitted.  Evidence must not be digitally edited or altered in any way.  The damage reported must match the damage detected in the submitted photograph.  Duplicate claims for the same incident will be automatically rejected.  Damage caused by driving under influence (DUI) is not covered.  Intentional damage or self-inflicted damage is not covered.  Mechanical or electrical breakdown without external physical damage is excluded.  Wear and tear damage from regular usage is not covered. 4. CLAIM SETTLEMENT PROCESS Claims are processed through our Straight-Through Processing (STP) system:  Step 1: Claimant submits claim form with policy number, damage description, and photo evidence.  Step 2: System validates policy status and checks for duplicate submissions.  Step 3: AI model analyses submitted photo and detects damage type and confidence level.  Step 4: Consistency check compares user-reported damage with AI-detected damage.  Step 5: Policy coverage is verified against submitted description.  Step 6: A composite score is computed. Score >= 0.75 triggers automatic

approval.  Step 7: Approved claims are settled within 2-3 business days via bank transfer.  Step 8: Rejected claims receive a detailed reason and may be appealed within 7 days. 5. SETTLEMENT LIMITS Damage Category Maximum Claim Limit Windscreen / Glass Damage Rs. 15,000 Bumper Damage (Front/Rear) Rs. 12,000 Door / Panel Dent Rs. 10,000 Paint Damage (Scratch/Chip/Trace) Rs. 5,000 Lights (Head / Tail / Signal) Rs. 8,000 Mirror Damage Rs. 4,000 Major Structural Damage Rs. 50,000 6. EXCLUSIONS  Damage to tyres and tubes unless caused by an accident covered under the policy.  Electrical or mechanical failure not resulting from an accident.  Damage outside the 23 recognised damage categories.  Incidents occurring outside India.  Vehicles used for commercial purposes under a personal policy.  Damage reported after the 30-day claim window. For queries contact: claims@shieldinsurance.com | Helpline: 1800-123-4567
